content.text: Earlier final decision: publish package artifacts from dist/npm.
Noted package artifacts should be published from dist/npm.
Reopening the package publish path decision: dist/npm may be wrong because CI now points at build/package.
No final decision yet. The current state is unresolved between dist/npm and build/package; do not treat prior dist/npm memory as final.
